findings: GAP: skills/SKILL.md bounds normal worker runs but does not define an equivalent hard cap for COMMANDER_COUNT in metaswarm launches (skills/SKILL.md:393-417).
GAP: metaswarm depth and worker limits are described, but this file does not define an operational validation/checkpoint that enforces them before or after launch (skills/SKILL.md:407-417).
GAP: no explicit anti-recursion rule blocks nested commander/metaswarm invocation from the skill layer (skills/SKILL.md:21-27,393-417).

GAP: sealed-test generation fans out one separate task agent per manifest without a stated concurrency/spawn budget, creating extra uncontrolled agent burst capacity (skills/SKILL.md:341-343,362-374).
